This is a testharness.js-based test.
[PRECONDITION_FAILED] A held lock on main thread should not prevent bfcache even after worker releases locks
  Could have been BFCached but actually wasn't
[PRECONDITION_FAILED] A held lock on worker should not prevent bfcache even after main thread releases locks
  Could have been BFCached but actually wasn't
[PRECONDITION_FAILED] A held lock on shared worker should not prevent bfcache even after main thread releases locks
  Could have been BFCached but actually wasn't
Harness: the test ran to completion.
